import pandas as pd

merged_df = pd.merge(dfs['MortalityRecord'], dfs['State'], on='state_id')
state_counts = merged_df.groupby('state_name').size().reset_index(name='count')
result = state_counts.values.tolist()

question: Which regions contain states that have 'California' in their name?

per_seed.code:
states_with_california = dfs['State'][dfs['State']['state_name'].str.contains('California', case=False, na=False)]
merged = states_with_california.merge(dfs['Region'], on='region_id')
result = merged['region_name'].unique().tolist()

question: Which regions have mortality records for 'Alzheimer's disease' in '2016'?

per_seed.code:
merged = dfs['MortalityRecord'].merge(dfs['Cause'], on='cause_id').merge(dfs['Year'], on='year_id').merge(dfs['Region'], on='region_id')
filtered = merged[(merged['cause_name'] == "Alzheimer's disease") & (merged['year'] == 2016)]
result = filtered['region_name'].unique().tolist()

result = filtered['region_name'].unique().tolist()

result = filtered['region_name'].unique().tolist()

question: Count the number of distinct causes associated with mortality records in states that are part of the 'Midwest' region.

per_seed.code:
midwest_region_id = dfs['Region'][dfs['Region']['region_name'] == 'Midwest']['region_id'].iloc[0]
midwest_states = dfs['State'][dfs['State']['region_id'] == midwest_region_id]['state_id']
midwest_records = dfs['MortalityRecord'][dfs['MortalityRecord']['state_id'].isin(midwest_states)]
result = int(midwest_records['cause_id'].nunique())

question: List the cause categories that include causes with mortality records in 'Washington' state for the year '2010'.
expected_answer: Injury / External Cause, Chronic Disease, All Causes (Roll-up), Infectious Disease

per_seed.answer:
All Causes (Roll-up)
Chronic Disease
Infectious Disease
Injury / External Cause
per_seed.code:
state_id = dfs['State'][dfs['State']['state_name'] == 'Washington']['state_id'].iloc[0]
year_id = dfs['Year'][dfs['Year']['year'] == 2010]['year_id'].iloc[0]

filtered_records = dfs['MortalityRecord'][(dfs['MortalityRecord']['state_id'] == state_id) & (dfs['MortalityRecord']['year_id'] == year_id)]
category_ids = filtered_records['cause_category_id'].unique()

result = dfs['CauseCategory'][dfs['CauseCategory']['cause_category_id'].isin(category_ids)]['cause_category_name'].unique().tolist()

per_seed.answer:
All Causes (Roll-up)
Chronic Disease
Infectious Disease
Injury / External Cause
per_seed.code:
import pandas as pd

# Join MortalityRecord with State and Year to filter by state name and year
mr = dfs['MortalityRecord']
states = dfs['State']
years = dfs['Year']
categories = dfs['CauseCategory']

# Filter for Washington state and year 2010
wa_state_id = states[states['state_name'] == 'Washington']['state_id'].iloc[0]
year_2010_id = years[years['year'] == 2010]['year_id'].iloc[0]

# Filter records
filtered_records = mr[(mr['state_id'] == wa_state_id) & (mr['year_id'] == year_2010_id)]

# Get unique cause_category_ids from filtered records
category_ids = filtered_records['cause_category_id'].unique()

# Map IDs to names
result = categories[categories['cause_category_id'].isin(category_ids)]['cause_category_name'].unique().tolist()

per_seed.answer:
All Causes (Roll-up)
Chronic Disease
Infectious Disease
Injury / External Cause
per_seed.code:
df_state = dfs['State']
df_year = dfs['Year']
df_mortality = dfs['MortalityRecord']
df_category = dfs['CauseCategory']

wa_id = df_state[df_state['state_name'] == 'Washington']['state_id'].iloc[0]
year_2010_id = df_year[df_year['year'] == 2010]['year_id'].iloc[0]

filtered_mortality = df_mortality[(df_mortality['state_id'] == wa_id) & (df_mortality['year_id'] == year_2010_id)]
category_ids = filtered_mortality['cause_category_id'].unique()

result = df_category[df_category['cause_category_id'].isin(category_ids)]['cause_category_name'].unique().tolist()

All Causes (Roll-up)
